checks.describe: ChromaDB heartbeat responds if the m5 lab is currently up (else SKIP-OK)

the experiment's tee'd stdout artifact (~/rag-deepdive-lab/variant-collections.txt) shows all 3 variant collections were created, if the experiment has been run (else SKIP-OK). This asserts MID-RUN state only: the page's own §7 teardown drops the 3 deepdive-* ChromaDB collections but does not delete this host file, and the page's final Teardown removes the whole ~/rag-deepdive-lab directory — so SKIP-OK is the expected, correct result once either teardown has run, not a failure.
deep-dive page carries the live retrieval comparison table
deep-dive page cites the lab's actual chunk_size/overlap values (500/50)
deep-dive page cites the lab's actual top-k value (k=3)
deep-dive page states the verified ChromaDB default distance metric (L2, not cosine)
deep-dive page carries the num_ctx=4096 context-budget arithmetic
deep-dive page distinguishes retrieval miss from generation miss
